title: India Search Innovation
subtitle: Redefining digital discovery for diverse Indian users.
problem_statement: Existing search solutions lack deep regional language support and intuitive interfaces for India's diverse, emerging internet users.

approach.goal: Understand primary user needs for search in India.
approach.method_desc: Best for new market entry, uncovering unmet needs.

pillars.title: Accessibility
pillars.insight: Many users are new to digital; need simple, clear interface.

pillars.title: Local Relevance
pillars.insight: Users seek information specific to their region/language.

pillars.title: Efficiency
pillars.insight: Users want quick, accurate answers despite connectivity issues.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we make search universally accessible in India?
How might users find relevant local information easily?
How might we integrate voice and visual search seamlessly?

solution.name: Google
solution.desc: Target Gap: Universal, intuitive, local search.

personas.name: Rohan
personas.quote: How do I find local market prices quickly?
personas.bio: Runs a small electronics shop, needs quick business info, uses Hindi.

personas.name: Priya
personas.quote: Can I search using my voice in Hindi?
personas.bio: First-time internet user, relies on voice search for education.

insights: How do I find this in my language?
I hope I can find what I need.

points.action: Replace text input with advanced voice/visual search.
Integrate local services directly into search results.
Tailor search algorithms for hyper-local Indian context.
Simplify search results page for first-time internet users.

pivot.before: Text-heavy, English-centric search limits access for many Indians.
pivot.pivot_logic: Prioritize multi-lingual voice/visual input for inclusivity and ease of use.
pivot.after: Universal, intuitive search experience for all Indians, fostering digital inclusion.

screens.title: Low-Fi
layout: Header (About, Store, Gmail, Images, Sign in)

annotations.title: Voice Search
annotations.rationale: Crucial for low literacy and regional language users.

annotations.title: Language Options
annotations.rationale: Empowers users to search in their native tongue.

annotations.title: Minimalist Layout
annotations.rationale: Reduces cognitive load for new internet users.

data.finding: Search bar and buttons are clearly visible.
UI elements consistent across desktop and mobile.
Search suggestions help prevent common typos.
